title: The Vanilla Plus+
description: A Vanilla+ Fabric 1.20.1 pack that adds smooth combat, new swords and armor, dungeons, wildlife, and co-op quests — keeping the Minecraft feel while expanding your adventures.
body:
Vanilla Plus is a lightweight Fabric modpack that keeps Minecraft feeling like Minecraft — just with more to do.
This pack adds smooth combat, new swords and armor, deeper dungeons, and fresh adventures without drifting into heavy modded territory.

✨ Features

⚔️ Combat Reforged – Better Combat & Simply Swords bring fluid attacks, dual-wielding, and vanilla-style weapon progression.

🏰 Dungeons & Exploration – YUNG’s Better Dungeons, Strongholds, and other structures make the world worth exploring. Towers, ruins, and sprawling underground dungeons await.

🐾 Living World – Alex’s Mobs & Naturalist add wildlife and fantasy creatures that feel right at home.

🎒 Artifacts & Loot – Find trinkets, charms, and treasures hidden in dungeons for fun perks.

🧭 Co-op Ready – FTB Quests, Teams, and Lootr make multiplayer exploration fair and fun.

📖 Biweekly Content – Built-in questlines and guidebook entries expand every two weeks, giving you a reason to return.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Play how you want

Solo players can follow the questbook for guided adventures.

Friends can team up with instanced loot and shared progression.
